mapper.sql: id, order_no, article_id, author_id, total_points, platform_points, author_points, share_ratio, settlement_status, point_journal_biz_no, settled_at, retry_count, last_error, created_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO revenue_share_journal (order_no, article_id, author_id, total_points, platform_points, author_points, share_ratio) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{articleId}, #{authorId}, #{totalPoints}, #{platformPoints}, #{authorPoints}, #{shareRatio})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM revenue_share_journal WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE revenue_share_journal SET settlement_status = 'SETTLED', point_journal_biz_no = #{pointJournalBizNo}, settled_at = NOW(), last_error = NULL, version = version + 1 WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND settlement_status != 'SETTLED'

UPDATE revenue_share_journal SET settlement_status = 'FAILED', retry_count = retry_count + 1, last_error = #{lastError}, version = version + 1 WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND settlement_status != 'SETTLED'
mapper.select: SELECT FROM revenue_share_journal WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND settlement_status IN ('PENDING', 'FAILED') AND retry_count < #{maxRetry} ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM revenue_share_journal WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
